title: Kinetics and Mechanism of Photodecomposition of Nifedipine by Use of Quantitative Glc Method
author: G. S. SADANA

 NIFEDIPINE i.e. dimethyl-1,4-dihydro-2,6-dimethyl-4-(2-nitrophenyl)-3,5-pyridine dicarboxylate (1) belongs to a class of drugs having calcium antago­nist activity.
